creator: hakan@siktas.com
text:
I had to fiddle around a bit, but after adding the `--unsafe-paths` option to `git apply`, everything else went fine. GitLab is now running on Puma. :)

I also changed the number of my worker processes according to https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/install/requirements.html#puma-settings in my `puma.rb` config file.
